description: Bubble chart of North Carolina's 8 SBE regions plotting each region's mean percent economically disadvantaged against its mean 2025 SPG score, with bubble area showing the region's total enrollment. Higher-poverty regions tend toward lower scores (correlation about −0.8): North Central and Southwest sit lower-poverty/higher-score, Sandhills higher-poverty/lower-score. Enrollment varies widely, from about 68,000 to 374,000. This is a scatter plot with a third measure added through size — not a part-to-whole bubble chart.

title.text: Higher-poverty regions tend to score lower
title.subtitle: Each bubble is one of NC's 8 SBE regions: mean % economically disadvantaged vs. mean SPG score, sized by total enrollment, 2025. Size adds a third measure to a scatter.

usermeta.source: Source: NCDPI SPG score (2025), % economically disadvantaged and enrollment (NCDPI school file), aggregated to SBE region (mean of schools; Virtual charters excluded). Style-guide demo.
